cell:B2:t:Introduction:l:1:f:3:c:3:bg:1:cf:1
cell:B3:l:1:f:2
cell:B4:t:Medication log allows you to track and record your medications over the course of your treatment. Comprehensive log sheets have been provided along with the month's calendar.:l:1:f:1
cell:B5:t:The monthly calendar helps you organise your medicines on a daily basis. The checkmark feature allows the user to quickly highlight a specific day from the month and add key notes alongside.:l:1:f:1:bg:2
cell:B6:t:Separate sheets have been given, that record other details like the due date of the medicine, prescribing physician, etc. as well as details regarding side effects, refill no. and the pharmacy phone number. The name of the medicine is automatically generated in these sheets, helping the user manage details in a hassle free manner. Just enter the medicine name in the first log sheet.:l:1:f:1
cell:B7:t:Entering data is simple. Tap on the cell to edit and add the text. Locally save your Medication log as a file, and re-use it with minimal changes. Simply tap e-mail to send it to your family or doctors instantly and get feedback from them. Alternatively, you can email it to yourself.:l:1:f:1:bg:2
cell:B8:t:If you need any further assistance in using the Medication Log application, or would like to see some new features in the future versions of the application, please write to us at marketing@tickervalue.com You can also meet us on Skype by sending a contact request to aspiring.investments:l:1:f:4
